positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical deep-sea creature, like a bioluminescent anglerfish mixed with a jellyfish. The creature should be the central focus, outlined with clean, graphic, high-contrast silhouettes. Use a color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, and neon lime green, against a negative space background. The style should be modern graphic illustration, inspired by Nordic folklore art and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, with crisp lines and flat color blocking. Include subtle texture gradients (like distressed screen printing) within the solid color areas. Perfect for a repeating pattern or apparel placement.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, low quality, text, signature, watermark, noise, messy, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, distorted, logo, anime, photorealistic, 3D render
